Prompt Studio Suite

Ten focused prompt workbenches

Pick the work. Build the prompt.

Each studio turns a real business job into a guided form and a complete prompt. Add your context once, choose the artifact or decision you need, then take the finished prompt into ChatGPT, Claude, or the assistant you already use.

Inside the collection

480

guided workflows across 10 markets, plus 60 ongoing advisor modes.

The collection

Choose your studio

Every studio is a standalone file. Your saved profile and prompt manual stay in your browser.

01 Guided prompt system for paid media Paid Traffic Built for advertisers, agencies, and founders spending money on ads. 48 workflows • 6 advisors Open studio → 02 Guided prompt system for expert services Coaching & Consulting Built for coaches, consultants, and advisors who need sharper offers, better client sessions, and recommendations people can act on. 48 workflows • 6 advisors Open studio → 03 Guided prompt system for creators Content Creator Built for YouTubers, podcasters, newsletter writers, and short-form creators who publish on a schedule. 48 workflows • 6 advisors Open studio → 04 Guided prompt system for online educators Course Builder For educators, trainers, and experts turning what they know into courses students finish. 48 workflows • 6 advisors Open studio → 05 Guided prompt system for online stores Ecommerce For store owners, ecommerce marketers, and the agencies who run their accounts. 48 workflows • 6 advisors Open studio → 06 Guided prompt system for email that sells Email Marketing Built for owners and marketers who need emails with a clear job. 48 workflows • 6 advisors Open studio → 07 Guided prompt system for launches Launch Campaign Built for founders, creators, and marketers coordinating a real launch. 48 workflows • 6 advisors Open studio → 08 Guided prompt system for community builders Membership & Community Built for membership owners and community builders, paid or free. 48 workflows • 6 advisors Open studio → 09 Guided prompt system for conversion copy Offer & Sales Page For owners, marketers, and copywriters turning an offer into a page that sells it. 48 workflows • 6 advisors Open studio → 10 Guided prompt system for social that converts Social Media For marketers, creators, and owner-run brands that post every week. 48 workflows • 6 advisors Open studio →
